channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Coming Soon, From the People Behind ICE Detention Camps: Data Center Company Towns
item.description: After partnering with CoreCivic to detain minors, this company now wants to give data center contractors a cushy home-away-from-home.

item.title: Could this be the key to eternal storage? Experts claim new DNA HDD can be ‘erased and overwritten repeatedly’
item.description: DNA-based storage could provide long-term alternatives to cloud storage and HDDs, but practical devices remain years away from reality.
